text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Tamamo Cross has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... There's somethin' important I wanna talk
to you about.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I worked hard in the series, yeah? Wouldn't you
say that's worth somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yes indeed. And the thing is, I'm completely worn
out from all those winning runs.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about time I cashed in on my prize!
Hand it over, pal!
choice_data_list: Please, this is all I have!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Keep your damn wallet, dummy! You know what I
mean!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our brisk gag exchange comes to an end.
choice_data_list: It's the hot spring ticket you want, right?
It's the hot spring ticket you want, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Right. Man... You're gettin' real good at playin'
dumb, ya know. You even got the pacin' nailed
down, haha.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're practically a comedy duo at this point.
Now, let's get goin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following our little comedy routine, we set off for
the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew, the hot water sure was somethin'. It
worked wonders on my bruises.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm on the smaller side, ya know? Gettin'
knocked about really wears me out.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I needed a nice, long soak... I've really
been puttin' my body through the wringer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I kinda feel guilty about it, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross gives her body some
much-overdue care.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's hard to let myself relax. I know this is
supposed to be my reward, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I do feel a bit bad kickin' back in the hot springs without my family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I promised I'd take 'em all to Arima someday.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, not that Arima. There's a famous hot spring
in Kansai with the same name.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I always wanted to go, so I promised we'd all go
together someday.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You made good on your promise to take me to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't made good on mine yet. I still
haven't taken 'em to Arima Hot Springs...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, sorry to ruin the mood. ...Maybe I'm not
thinkin' straight after sittin' in that hot water for
so long.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Go where?
choice_data_list: To Arima Hot Springs, with your family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You sure 'bout that? First you brought me here, and now you wanna spoil my folks too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Tamamo Cross is racing to make her family
happy...
choice_data_list:
Our ultimate goal should be the Arima Hot
Springs, not the Arima Kinen.

Our ultimate goal should be the Arima Hot
Springs, not the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hahaha... That was a good one, I'll give ya that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can't even think of a good comeback. You're
one heck of a...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All this time I've been working towards... towards
Arima Hot Springs, and...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Mom, Dad... I... I did it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, miles away from her family, is
struck by a wave of homesickness.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Argh, that's enough of that! I'm not gonna sit
around bein' wishy-washy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer, we're gonna enjoy the hell outta this onsen! You're gonna look like a raisin by the time ya get outta the water!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs have always been on my to-go list!
And I'm gettin' my ticket's worth tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's family-related guilt fades and
she enjoys her time at the resort with childlike
glee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Tamamo Cross and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond.
